productName: Super Fog - Fire - Tank - 1g (1pk) - Blu VooDoo - HYB - Dessert
description: A hybrid vape cartridge filled with Blu Voodoo oil — smooth, flavorful vapor in a discreet, no-torch, push-button format that goes wherever you go. Flavor on the go, a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, leading into an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
